attributes.name: Vehicle OEM
attributes.description: Defines top-level system requirements, owns the vehicle architecture, and bears legal responsibility for homologation
attributes.interest: Performance, cost, safety, regulatory compliance, warranty exposure

attributes.name: Battery Cell Supplier
attributes.description: Supplies lithium-ion cells, cell-level characterisation data, and safety datasheets. Defines cell operating limits.
attributes.interest: Cell operating envelope respected, SOP/SoH algorithms validated against supplier data

attributes.name: Power Electronics Supplier
attributes.description: Supplies the inverter, OBC, and DC-DC converter. Defines thermal derating curves and electrical interfaces.
attributes.interest: Interface specs met, derating curves honoured, warranty conditions not exceeded

attributes.name: Charging Network Operator
attributes.description: Operates DC fast chargers and AC Level 2 stations. Requires CCS/CHAdeMO/OCPP compatibility and reliable handshake protocol.
attributes.interest: OCPP 2.0.1 compliance, ISO 15118 Plug & Charge, reliable session establishment

attributes.name: End Customer / Vehicle Owner
attributes.description: Purchases and daily-drives the vehicle. Cares about range, charge time, ride quality, and total cost of ownership.
attributes.interest: 250+ mile range, <30 min 10–80% DC fast charge, smooth regen, transparent SOC display

attributes.name: Insurance Provider
attributes.description: Assesses vehicle safety record, crash response, and telematics data for underwriting and claims processing.
attributes.interest: Automatic collision reporting, HV safe-state after crash, telematics API access

attributes.name: Dealership / Service Network
attributes.description: Performs warranty repairs, scheduled maintenance, and OTA-triggered field fixes. Uses OEM diagnostic tools.
attributes.interest: Clear DTCs, OBD-II access, OTA update capability, safe HV handling procedures

attributes.name: Government / Regulatory Body
attributes.description: Mandates safety, emissions, and electromagnetic compatibility standards. Approval required before vehicle sale.
attributes.interest: FMVSS 305, UN ECE R100 (HV safety), ISO 26262 ASIL evidence, CARB/EPA emissions

attributes.name: Charging Station (EVSE)
attributes.description: External AC or DC charging equipment that negotiates charge parameters with the vehicle via CCS/CHAdeMO or J1772 protocol

attributes.name: Electric Vehicle Powertrain System
attributes.description: Full-vehicle EV powertrain architecture covering traction, energy storage, charging, and thermal management

attributes.name: Driver
attributes.description: Primary operator of the vehicle, interacts with HMI, accelerator, brake, and gear selector

attributes.name: Fleet Manager
attributes.description: Monitors vehicle health, range, and charge status remotely via telematics

attributes.name: Service Technician
attributes.description: Performs diagnostics, firmware updates, and hardware repairs using service tools

attributes.name: Regulatory Authority
attributes.description: Defines safety, EMC, and environmental standards the vehicle must meet (FMVSS, UN ECE, ISO 26262)

attributes.name: Normal Drive Operation
attributes.description: Driver accelerates and cruises on road power. VCU translates pedal position to motor torque command.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle in READY state, SOC > 5%, no active faults
attributes.postcondition: Motor delivers requested torque; vehicle speed changes

attributes.name: Regenerative Braking
attributes.description: Motor operates as generator during deceleration, recovering kinetic energy to battery
attributes.precondition: Vehicle moving, SOC < 95%, brake pedal applied

attributes.name: DC Fast Charging
attributes.description: Vehicle connected to DC fast charger (CCS/CHAdeMO). BMS negotiates charge parameters.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle parked, HV interlock closed, charger connected
attributes.postcondition: Battery SOC increased; cell temps within bounds

attributes.name: AC Level 2 Charging
attributes.description: On-board charger converts AC from grid to DC for battery charging
attributes.precondition: Vehicle parked, AC inlet connected, OBC active
attributes.postcondition: Battery charged at up to 11 kW

attributes.name: Thermal Management
attributes.description: System maintains battery and motor within operating temperature range using active cooling/heating
attributes.postcondition: Cell temps 15–45°C during charge, 0–60°C during drive

attributes.name: Fault Detection and Response
attributes.description: BMS and VCU detect hardware/software faults, isolate HV, and alert driver
attributes.postcondition: Safe state entered; fault codes logged; driver alerted

attributes.name: Remote Diagnostics
attributes.description: Fleet manager reads live telemetry and fault codes over cellular link without physical access
attributes.precondition: Telematics module active, data connection available
attributes.postcondition: Fault codes and live signals visible in fleet portal

attributes.name: Service Mode
attributes.description: Technician puts vehicle in service mode to perform calibration, firmware update, and diagnostics
attributes.precondition: Vehicle parked, service tool connected via OBD-II
attributes.postcondition: ECU parameters updated, faults cleared, tests passed

attributes.name: Battery Pack
attributes.description: 400V lithium-ion NMC battery pack, 75 kWh capacity, 288 prismatic cells in 96s3p configuration

attributes.name: Battery Management System
attributes.description: Master BMS with cell voltage/temp monitoring, SOC/SOH estimation, cell balancing, and safety relay control

attributes.name: Power Inverter
attributes.description: 3-phase SiC MOSFET inverter, 150 kW peak, 450V max DC link, 650A peak phase current

attributes.name: Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor
attributes.description: IPMSM, 150 kW peak / 100 kW continuous, 3500 Nm peak torque at wheel (via single-speed gearbox)

attributes.name: Motor Control Unit
attributes.description: High-performance motor controller implementing FOC/DTC, torque vectoring, and regen control

attributes.name: On-Board Charger
attributes.description: 11 kW bidirectional AC/DC converter supporting J1772/IEC 62196 single and three-phase AC charging

attributes.name: DC-DC Converter
attributes.description: Isolated step-down converter, HV bus to 12V LV bus, 3 kW capacity for 12V ancillary loads

attributes.name: Thermal Management System
attributes.description: Active liquid cooling/heating for battery, motor, and power electronics using shared coolant loop and heat pump

attributes.name: Vehicle Control Unit
attributes.description: Central coordinator: translates driver inputs to torque/regen commands, manages drive modes and safety interlocks

attributes.name: HMI / Dashboard
attributes.description: 12-inch touchscreen cluster showing SOC, range, charge status, fault alerts, and drive mode selector

attributes.name: HV Junction Box
attributes.description: Houses main contactors, HV fuses, current sensor, and pyro fuse for emergency HV isolation

attributes.name: Telematics Control Unit
attributes.description: 4G/LTE and Wi-Fi connectivity for OTA updates, remote diagnostics, and fleet management APIs

attributes.name: Powertrain CAN Bus
attributes.description: ISO 11898 CAN FD bus connecting VCU, MCU, BMS, and OBC at 2 Mbit/s

attributes.name: Body CAN Bus
attributes.description: Classic CAN 500 kbit/s bus connecting HMI, TMS, DCDC, and telematics

attributes.name: HV DC Bus
attributes.description: 400V DC high-voltage bus from battery pack through HV junction box to inverter and OBC

attributes.name: AC Charge Inlet
attributes.description: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 AC inlet for Level 1 and Level 2 AC charging

attributes.name: DC Fast Charge Inlet
attributes.description: CCS Combo 2 inlet for DC fast charging up to 150 kW

attributes.name: OBD-II Diagnostic Port
attributes.description: ISO 15765-4 compliant OBD-II port for UDS diagnostics and service tool access

attributes.name: BMS_SOC
attributes.description: Battery state of charge as a percentage of usable capacity

attributes.name: BMS_SOH
attributes.description: Battery state of health — ratio of current to nominal capacity

attributes.name: BMS_PackVoltage
attributes.description: Total pack voltage measured at HV bus terminals

attributes.name: BMS_PackCurrent
attributes.description: Pack current — positive = discharge, negative = charge

attributes.name: BMS_CellTempMax
attributes.description: Maximum cell temperature across all 288 cells

attributes.name: BMS_CellTempMin
attributes.description: Minimum cell temperature across all cells

attributes.name: BMS_CellVoltMax
attributes.description: Highest individual cell voltage

attributes.name: BMS_CellVoltMin
attributes.description: Lowest individual cell voltage

attributes.name: MCU_MotorSpeed
attributes.description: Actual electrical motor speed (rotor RPM)

attributes.name: MCU_TorqueActual
attributes.description: Actual electromagnetic torque produced by motor

attributes.name: VCU_TorqueCommand
attributes.description: Torque command sent from VCU to MCU

attributes.name: MCU_MotorTemp
attributes.description: Motor winding temperature (averaged across 3 phases)

attributes.name: MCU_InverterTemp
attributes.description: IGBT/SiC baseplate temperature of the power stage

attributes.name: VCU_AccelPedal
attributes.description: Accelerator pedal position (0 = released, 100 = full)

attributes.name: VCU_BrakePressure
attributes.description: Hydraulic brake line pressure from brake pedal transducer

attributes.name: VCU_VehicleSpeed
attributes.description: Estimated vehicle speed derived from wheel speed sensors

attributes.name: VCU_RangeEstimate
attributes.description: Estimated remaining range based on SOC and recent energy consumption

attributes.name: BMS_HVInterlock
attributes.description: HV interlock loop status — true = all connectors seated, HV safe to enable

attributes.name: BMS_ContactorState
attributes.description: HV main contactor state (0=open, 1=precharge, 2=closed, 3=fault)

attributes.name: BMS_FaultCode
attributes.description: BMS active fault code (0 = no fault). Bit-encoded: bit0=OV, bit1=UV, bit2=OT, bit3=UT, bit4=OC, bit5=interlock

attributes.name: MCU_FaultCode
attributes.description: MCU active fault code (0 = no fault). Bit-encoded: bit0=overcurrent, bit1=overtemp, bit2=gate-driver, bit3=resolver

attributes.name: OBC_ChargeCurrent
attributes.description: DC charge current commanded by OBC or DCFC station

attributes.name: OBC_ChargeVoltage
attributes.description: DC charge voltage at pack terminals

attributes.name: TMS_CoolantTemp
attributes.description: Coolant temperature at the battery inlet

attributes.name: TMS_FanSpeed
attributes.description: Cooling fan commanded speed as % of max

attributes.name: VCU_DriveMode
attributes.description: Active drive mode (0=Eco, 1=Normal, 2=Sport, 3=OneP)

attributes.name: Torque Control
attributes.description: Translates driver accelerator and brake inputs into a motor torque command, applying torque blending between regen and friction braking

attributes.name: SOC Estimation
attributes.description: Extended Kalman Filter–based state-of-charge estimator using current integration, OCV lookup, and temperature correction

attributes.name: Cell Balancing
attributes.description: Passive or active balancing to equalise cell voltages within 10 mV tolerance during charge tail phase

attributes.name: Thermal Regulation
attributes.description: PID-controlled coolant pump and fan speed to maintain battery and motor temps within safe operating range

attributes.name: Charge Management
attributes.description: Negotiates charge parameters with EVSE/DCFC, implements CC-CV charge profile, and terminates on full charge or fault

attributes.name: HV Safety Monitoring
attributes.description: Continuously monitors HV interlock, insulation resistance, and contactor state. Opens main contactors on fault within 10 ms.

attributes.name: Fault Detection and Response
attributes.description: Aggregates BMS and MCU fault codes, classifies severity (warning/critical), triggers safe state transitions, and logs DTC codes

attributes.name: Regenerative Braking Control
attributes.description: Calculates recoverable regen torque limited by SOC, temperature, and stability constraints; blends with hydraulic braking

attributes.name: Driver Interface
attributes.description: Renders SOC, range estimate, speed, fault alerts, and drive mode on HMI. Handles drive mode selection input.

attributes.name: Range Estimation
attributes.description: Predicts remaining range using SOC, recent energy consumption rate, and route terrain data

attributes.name: Pre-Charge Control
attributes.description: Controls pre-charge resistor and contactor sequence to safely charge DC link capacitors before main contactors close

attributes.name: SOH Estimation
attributes.description: Estimates battery state of health via capacity fade tracking and internal resistance measurement over charge cycles

attributes.name: AccelPedal_In
attributes.description: Accelerator pedal % input to torque control

attributes.name: BrakePressure_In
attributes.description: Brake pressure input to torque control

attributes.name: SOC_In_Torque
attributes.description: SOC used to limit regen torque near full charge

attributes.name: TorqueCmd_Out
attributes.description: Torque command output

attributes.name: PackVoltage_In
attributes.description: Pack voltage for SOC estimation

attributes.name: PackCurrent_In
attributes.description: Pack current for coulomb counting

attributes.name: CellTemp_In_SOC
attributes.description: Cell temp for temperature-corrected OCV lookup

attributes.name: SOC_Out
attributes.description: Estimated SOC output

attributes.name: CellVoltMax_In
attributes.description: Max cell voltage for balancing trigger

attributes.name: CellVoltMin_In
attributes.description: Min cell voltage for balancing reference

attributes.name: CellTemp_In_TMS
attributes.description: Cell temp input to thermal regulation

attributes.name: MotorTemp_In_TMS
attributes.description: Motor temp input to thermal regulation

attributes.name: FanSpeed_Out
attributes.description: Fan speed command output from thermal regulation

attributes.name: CoolantFlow_Out
attributes.description: Coolant flow command (temp setpoint output)

attributes.name: ChargeCurrent_In
attributes.description: Charge current request from EVSE

attributes.name: SOC_In_Charge
attributes.description: SOC input to charge management (cut-off logic)

attributes.name: CellTemp_In_Charge
attributes.description: Cell temp for charge enable/derate decision

attributes.name: ChargeVoltage_Out
attributes.description: Target charge voltage sent to charger

attributes.name: HVInterlock_In
attributes.description: HV interlock status for safety monitoring

attributes.name: ContactorState_Out
attributes.description: Contactor open/close command

attributes.name: BMSFault_In
attributes.description: BMS fault code input to fault detection

attributes.name: MCUFault_In
attributes.description: MCU fault code input to fault detection

attributes.name: BrakePressure_In_Regen
attributes.description: Brake pressure for regen/friction blend calculation

attributes.name: SOC_In_Regen
attributes.description: SOC limit — regen disabled when SOC >= 95%

attributes.name: RegenTorque_Out
attributes.description: Negative torque command for regen operation

attributes.name: SOC_In_Range
attributes.description: SOC input to range estimation

attributes.name: Speed_In_Range
attributes.description: Speed input to range model

attributes.name: Range_Out
attributes.description: Estimated range output

attributes.name: SOC_In_HMI
attributes.description: SOC displayed on dashboard

attributes.name: Speed_In_HMI
attributes.description: Vehicle speed shown on speedometer

attributes.name: BMSFault_In_HMI
attributes.description: Fault code for dashboard warning display

attributes.name: Range_In_HMI
attributes.description: Range estimate displayed on HMI

attributes.name: DriveMode_Out_HMI
attributes.description: Selected drive mode from HMI input

attributes.name: BMS Idle
attributes.description: Battery at rest, no charge or discharge, contactors open

attributes.name: BMS Pre-Charge
attributes.description: Pre-charge resistor in circuit, DC link voltage ramping to battery voltage

attributes.name: BMS Ready
attributes.description: Main contactors closed, HV available, no active faults

attributes.name: BMS Charging
attributes.description: Battery accepting charge current from OBC or DCFC

attributes.name: BMS Balancing
attributes.description: Passive cell balancing active during charge tail (SOC > 80%)

attributes.name: BMS Fault
attributes.description: Active fault — HV isolated, fault code broadcast on CAN

attributes.name: Drive: Park
attributes.description: Vehicle stationary, drive disabled, parking brake engaged

attributes.name: Drive: Ready
attributes.description: HV enabled, motor energised, vehicle ready to move on torque command

attributes.name: Drive: Drive
attributes.description: Vehicle moving under motor torque in forward or reverse

attributes.name: Drive: Regen
attributes.description: Vehicle decelerating with regenerative torque active

attributes.name: Charge: Standby
attributes.description: Charge inlet connected, EVSE handshake not yet complete

attributes.name: Charge: Active
attributes.description: Charge current flowing into battery per CC-CV profile

attributes.name: Charge: Complete
attributes.description: Battery reached target SOC; charge terminated normally

attributes.name: SOC Above Minimum Drive Threshold
attributes.description: Vehicle may only enter Drive state if battery SOC exceeds 5% to prevent deep discharge damage

attributes.name: SOC Below Regen Limit
attributes.description: Regenerative braking only permitted when SOC is below 95% to prevent overcharge

attributes.name: Cell Temp Within Charge Window
attributes.description: Charging enabled only when all cells are within 0–45°C thermal window

attributes.name: Cell Temp Within Discharge Window
attributes.description: Discharge permitted when cell temps are in safe range

attributes.name: DC Link Voltage Within 10V of Pack Voltage
attributes.description: Pre-charge complete when DC link has ramped to within 10V of battery terminal voltage

attributes.name: HV Interlock Closed
attributes.description: HV may only be enabled when interlock loop confirms all HV connectors are fully seated

attributes.name: Cell Overvoltage Detected
attributes.description: Triggers fault state immediately if any cell exceeds maximum voltage limit

attributes.name: Cell Undervoltage Detected
attributes.description: Triggers fault state if any cell falls below minimum safe voltage

attributes.name: SOC Above Balance Entry Threshold
attributes.description: Cell balancing activates during charge when SOC reaches 80%

attributes.name: SOC Reached Target
attributes.description: Charge session terminated when SOC reaches configured target (default 100%)

attributes.name: All Faults Cleared
attributes.description: System may exit fault state only when all fault conditions have been cleared and safety checks passed

attributes.name: SOC Estimation Accuracy
attributes.text: The BMS shall estimate state of charge with an accuracy of ±3% across a temperature range of -20°C to +45°C and for SOC values between 5% and 100%.

attributes.name: HV Isolation on Fault
attributes.text: The BMS shall open the main HV contactors within 10 ms of detecting any fault condition classified as critical (overvoltage, undervoltage, overcurrent, overtemperature).

attributes.name: Peak Motor Torque
attributes.text: The motor drive system shall produce a peak torque of no less than 320 Nm at the motor shaft for a duration of at least 30 seconds from a cold start at 25°C.

attributes.name: Regenerative Braking Efficiency
attributes.text: The regenerative braking system shall recover no less than 70% of kinetic energy during a standard deceleration from 80 km/h to 0 km/h on level road.

attributes.name: AC Charge Rate
attributes.text: The on-board charger shall accept 11 kW three-phase AC charging at 230V/32A per phase and shall charge the battery from 20% to 80% SOC within 4 hours.

attributes.name: DC Fast Charge Rate
attributes.text: The system shall support DC fast charging at up to 150 kW peak and shall charge the battery from 10% to 80% SOC in no more than 30 minutes at 25°C ambient.

attributes.name: Battery Thermal Operating Range — Drive
attributes.text: The thermal management system shall maintain all battery cells within 0°C to 60°C during normal drive operation across all drive modes.

attributes.name: Battery Thermal Operating Range — Charge
attributes.text: The thermal management system shall limit battery cell temperature to a maximum of 45°C during charging and shall derate charge current when cell temperature exceeds 40°C.

attributes.name: SOH Tracking
attributes.text: The BMS shall track battery state of health and report SOH with an accuracy of ±5% after the first full charge-discharge cycle.

attributes.name: Fault Logging with DTC
attributes.text: The VCU shall log all fault events with a diagnostic trouble code (DTC), timestamp, and vehicle state to non-volatile memory and make them accessible via OBD-II UDS protocol.

attributes.name: Range Estimation Display Accuracy
attributes.text: The range estimation algorithm shall predict remaining range within ±15 km under mixed-cycle driving conditions (50% city, 50% highway) at temperatures between -10°C and +40°C.

attributes.name: CAN Safety Signal Latency
attributes.text: Safety-critical CAN signals (BMS_FaultCode, BMS_HVInterlock, VCU_TorqueCommand) shall be transmitted and received within 10 ms end-to-end under maximum bus load conditions.

attributes.name: Pre-Charge Completion Time
attributes.text: The pre-charge sequence shall bring the DC link capacitor voltage within 10V of the battery pack voltage within 5 seconds of initiating the pre-charge contactor.

attributes.name: OBD-II Compliance
attributes.text: The vehicle shall implement ISO 15765-4 compliant OBD-II communication over the diagnostic port and shall support UDS services 0x10, 0x11, 0x14, 0x19, 0x22, 0x27, 0x2E, 0x2F, 0x31, 0x34, 0x36, 0x37, 0x3E.

attributes.name: Over-The-Air Software Update
attributes.text: The telematics unit shall support over-the-air firmware updates for VCU, BMS, and MCU ECUs with cryptographic signature verification, rollback protection, and update installation within 30 minutes.

attributes.name: Cell Balance Voltage Tolerance
attributes.text: The BMS cell balancing function shall equalise all cell voltages to within 10 mV of each other within 4 hours of entering the balancing state.

attributes.name: Motor System Peak Efficiency
attributes.text: The motor and inverter combined shall achieve a peak electrical-to-mechanical efficiency of no less than 95% at operating points between 3000–8000 RPM and 50–150 kW.

attributes.name: End-of-Line Test Coverage
attributes.text: All safety-critical functions (HV isolation, contactor operation, BMS fault detection) shall be exercised and verified at end-of-line production test with pass/fail results recorded per unit.

attributes.name: HV Insulation Resistance
attributes.text: The HV system shall maintain an insulation resistance of no less than 100 Ω/V (40 kΩ at 400V) between any HV conductor and the vehicle chassis under all operating conditions.

attributes.name: Drive-Ready Time
attributes.text: From key-on, the vehicle shall reach the READY-to-drive state (HV enabled, motor energised) within 3 seconds under nominal conditions.

attributes.name: EV Launch from Stop
attributes.description: Driver presses accelerator from standstill. VCU maps AccelPedal (0→80%) to a torque ramp of 0→256 Nm over 500 ms. MCU_MotorSpeed rises from 0 to 3200 RPM; VehicleSpeed reaches 50 km/h in 4.2 s. SOC decreases ~0.5% per km. Guard: SOC > 5%, CellTempMax < 60°C.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle in Drive:Ready state, SOC=45%, CellTempMax=28°C, VehicleSpeed=0
attributes.trigger: AccelPedal rises from 0% to 80% over 200 ms
attributes.observable_signals: VCU_AccelPedal, VCU_TorqueCommand, MCU_TorqueActual, MCU_MotorSpeed, VCU_VehicleSpeed, BMS_SOC
attributes.expected_result: VehicleSpeed reaches 50 km/h within 4.5 s; TorqueActual tracks TorqueCommand within ±5 Nm

attributes.name: Regenerative Braking Activation
attributes.description: Driver releases accelerator at 80 km/h; BrakePressure rises to 30 bar. VCU requests negative torque (-120 Nm). Motor acts as generator returning energy. SOC increases. Guard: SOC < 95%; if SOC >= 95%, regen is disabled and full hydraulic braking applied.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle in Drive:Drive state, VehicleSpeed=80 km/h, SOC=60%, BrakePressure=0 bar
attributes.trigger: AccelPedal drops to 0%, BrakePressure rises to 30 bar over 100 ms
attributes.observable_signals: VCU_BrakePressure, VCU_TorqueCommand, MCU_TorqueActual, MCU_MotorSpeed, VCU_VehicleSpeed, BMS_SOC, BMS_PackCurrent
attributes.expected_result: TorqueCommand goes to -120 Nm; PackCurrent goes negative (charging); SOC increases by ~1% per 10 s of regen; VehicleSpeed decelerates at ~3 m/s²

attributes.name: Cell Overvoltage Fault During Charging
attributes.description: During DC fast charge, a cell reaches 4.25 V (overvoltage threshold). BMS detects guard_cell_ov, sets BMS_FaultCode bit0=1, opens main contactors within 10 ms, transitions to BMS Fault state. VCU receives fault over CAN and halts charge session. Driver HMI displays fault alert.
attributes.precondition: BMS in Charging state, SOC=95%, OBC_ChargeCurrent=150 A, CellVoltMax=4.20 V
attributes.expected_result: BMS_FaultCode bit0 set within 10 ms; BMS_ContactorState transitions to 0 (open); OBC_ChargeCurrent drops to 0 within 200 ms; HMI displays OV fault alert

attributes.name: DC Fast Charge Session (20%→80%)
attributes.description: Vehicle connects to 150 kW DCFC. BMS negotiates parameters over CAN (OBC_ChargeVoltage=410 V, max current based on SOC and temp). Charge follows CC-CV profile: constant current 200 A until SOC=80%, then CV with current taper. TMS maintains CellTempMax < 40°C via active cooling.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle parked, BMS in Charging state, SOC=20%, CellTempMax=25°C, DCFC connected
attributes.trigger: EVSE handshake complete; BMS closes charge contactor
attributes.observable_signals: BMS_SOC, BMS_PackVoltage, BMS_PackCurrent, OBC_ChargeCurrent, OBC_ChargeVoltage, BMS_CellTempMax, TMS_CoolantTemp, TMS_FanSpeed
attributes.expected_result: SOC rises from 20% to 80% within 30 min; CellTempMax stays below 40°C throughout; charge terminates on SOC≥80%

attributes.name: Motor Thermal Derating Under Sustained Load
attributes.description: During sustained high-speed motorway driving (120 km/h), MCU_MotorTemp rises toward 155°C. VCU activates thermal derating: TorqueCommand reduced linearly 5% per °C above 150°C. TMS ramps TMS_FanSpeed to 100%. If MotorTemp exceeds 180°C, VCU commands 0 Nm and driver alert issued.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle in Drive:Drive state, VehicleSpeed=120 km/h, MotorTemp=130°C, FanSpeed=60%
attributes.trigger: MCU_MotorTemp crosses 150°C after 8 min sustained high load
attributes.observable_signals: MCU_MotorTemp, VCU_TorqueCommand, MCU_TorqueActual, TMS_FanSpeed, TMS_CoolantTemp, VCU_VehicleSpeed
attributes.expected_result: TorqueCommand derated proportionally above 150°C; FanSpeed reaches 100% within 500 ms of 150°C threshold; vehicle maintains safe operation without entering fault state

attributes.name: Low SOC Limp-Home Mode
attributes.description: SOC drops below 10%. VCU limits VCU_TorqueCommand to 50% of maximum to extend range. At SOC=5% (guard_soc_min_drive threshold), VCU issues driver warning and further limits to 20% torque. At SOC=2%, VCU commands 0 Nm and transitions vehicle to Park to prevent deep discharge.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle in Drive:Drive state, VehicleSpeed=60 km/h, SOC=12%
attributes.trigger: BMS_SOC drops below 10% due to energy consumption
attributes.observable_signals: BMS_SOC, VCU_TorqueCommand, VCU_VehicleSpeed, VCU_RangeEstimate, HMI warning status
attributes.expected_result: TorqueCommand capped at 50% at SOC=10%; further capped to 20% at SOC=5%; vehicle halted at SOC=2%; HMI shows low-SOC warning at each threshold

attributes.name: Cell Overvoltage Limit
attributes.description: Absolute maximum cell voltage — exceeding causes permanent capacity loss and thermal runaway risk

attributes.name: Cell Undervoltage Limit
attributes.description: Minimum cell voltage — below this causes copper dissolution and permanent capacity loss

attributes.name: Cell Overtemperature Limit
attributes.description: Maximum allowable cell temperature — above this accelerates degradation and thermal runaway

attributes.name: Motor Overtemperature Limit
attributes.description: Motor winding insulation degradation starts above 180°C
